languages.text: {n}Ирлиэт и Маражай внимательно смотрят на экспонат, после чего обмениваются взглядами и несколькими приглушенными репликами на своем языке, которые ваш Толкователь не успевает перевести. Похоже, ксеносы в редком для них единении не хотят посвящать вас в свои размышления.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ирлиэт и Маражай внимательно смотрят на экспонат, после чего обмениваются взглядами и несколькими приглушенными репликами на своем языке, которые ваш Толкователь не успевает перевести. Похоже, ксеносы в редком для них единении не хотят посвящать вас в свои размышления.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ирлиэт и Маражай внимательно смотрят на экспонат, после чего обмениваются взглядами и несколькими приглушенными репликами на своем языке, которые ваш Толкователь не успевает перевести. Похоже, ксеносы в редком для них единении не хотят посвящать вас в свои размышления.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

{n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yrliet y Marazhai miran con atención la exposición y después se miran y cuchichean en su idioma. Tu dilucidador no logra interpretar sus palabras a tiempo. Parece que los xenos, sorprendentemente unidos por una vez, no quieren que sepas lo que piensan.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet y Marazhai miran con atención la exposición y después se miran y cuchichean en su idioma. Tu dilucidador no logra interpretar sus palabras a tiempo. Parece que los xenos, sorprendentemente unidos por una vez, no quieren que sepas lo que piensan.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊莉耶特和玛拉斋专注地看着展品，随后交换了一下眼神，用他们自己的语言低声交谈了几句。你的阐释器没能及时译出他们的对话。看来，这两名异形难得地达成了一致，不想让你知道他们的想法。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊莉耶特和玛拉斋专注地看着展品，随后交换了一下眼神，用他们自己的语言低声交谈了几句。你的阐释器没能及时译出他们的对话。看来，这两名异形难得地达成了一致，不想让你知道他们的想法。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yrliet et Marazhai observent attentivement l'exposition, puis ils échangent des regards et quelques remarques à mi-voix dans leur langue commune, que votre élucidateur ne parvient pas à traduire à temps. Unis dans un rare moment de fraternité, les xénos ne souhaitent manifestement pas vous mettre dans la confidence.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet et Marazhai observent attentivement l'exposition, puis ils échangent des regards et quelques remarques à mi-voix dans leur langue commune, que votre élucidateur ne parvient pas à traduire à temps. Unis dans un rare moment de fraternité, les xénos ne souhaitent manifestement pas vous mettre dans la confidence.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yrliet ve Marazhai, sergiye dikkatle bakıp ardından bakıyor. Aydınlatıcı'nın zamanında tercüme edemediği kendi dillerinde birkaç fısıltılı söz paylaşıyorlar. Görünüşe göre zenolar, nadir görülen bir birlik gösterisiyle düşüncelerine dâhil olmanı istemiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet ve Marazhai, sergiye dikkatle bakıp ardından bakıyor. Aydınlatıcı'nın zamanında tercüme edemediği kendi dillerinde birkaç fısıltılı söz paylaşıyorlar. Görünüşe göre zenolar, nadir görülen bir birlik gösterisiyle düşüncelerine dâhil olmanı istemiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}イルリエットとマラーザイは展示品をじっと見つめ、それから互いの目を合わせ、ささやき声で何かを話している。しかし、あなたのエリュシデーターは彼らの言葉を間に合わずに翻訳することができなかった。異種族は珍しいほど一致団結して、あなたに自分の考えを悟られないようにしているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}イルリエットとマラーザイは展示品をじっと見つめ、それから互いの目を合わせ、ささやき声で何かを話している。しかし、あなたのエリュシデーターは彼らの言葉を間に合わずに翻訳することができなかった。異種族は珍しいほど一致団結して、あなたに自分の考えを悟られないようにしているようだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yrliet und Marazhai betrachten das Exponat eingehend, ehe sie Blicke und einige Worte in ihrer Sprache austauschen, die dein Elucidator nicht rechtzeitig übersetzen kann. Offenbar wollen die Xenos in seltener Einigkeit niemanden an ihren Gedanken teilhaben lassen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}
